payments.title: Payments

activateDesc.gram_panchayat: Activate a billing cycle to generate bills for all households.
activateDesc.municipality: Activate a billing cycle to generate bills for all properties.
activateDesc.apartment: Activate a billing cycle to generate bills for all flats.
activateDesc.township: Activate a billing cycle to generate bills for all plots.
activateDesc.institution_campus: Activate a billing cycle to generate bills for all units.

payments.activationFailedDesc: Could not activate billing cycle. Please try again.
payments.alreadyActive: Billing cycle for {{month}} is already active.
payments.noFeePolicy: No fee policy configured. Please set up fees in Settings before activating.
payments.feesLockedWarning: After activation, fees for {{month}} are locked and cannot be changed.
payments.paymentFailedDesc: Could not record payment. Please try again.
payments.undoFailedDesc: Could not undo payment. Please try again.
payments.bulkPaymentFailedDesc: Could not process bulk payment. Please try again.
payments.paymentWindowTimedOut: The payment window has timed out.
payments.paymentNotProcessed: The payment could not be processed.
payments.orderCreationFailedDesc: Could not create payment order. Please try again.
payments.setAtLeastOneFee: Please set at least one fee
payments.feeForTypeMustBePositive: Fee for {{type}} must be > 0 (or mark as waived)
payments.feeSaveFailedDesc: Could not save fee policy. Please try again.
payments.testFailedDesc: Gateway connection test failed. Please check your credentials.
payments.maskedValuesShown: Masked values shown. Leave blank to keep existing, or enter new values to update.
payments.webhookUrlDesc: Paste this URL in your {{provider}} dashboard → Webhooks section:
payments.gatewayConfigFailedDesc: Could not save gateway config. Please try again.
payments.removeGatewayDesc: This payment gateway will be removed.
payments.razorpayKeyInstructions: Go to Razorpay Dashboard → Settings → API Keys
payments.razorpayKeyId: Key ID → paste in "Key ID" field above
payments.razorpayKeySecret: Key Secret → paste in "Key Secret" field above (shown only once!)
payments.razorpayWebhookEvents: Settings → Webhooks → Add New → select these events:
payments.razorpayWebhookSecret: In the webhook form, set a secret → paste it in "Webhook Secret" field above.
payments.cashfreeKeyInstructions: Go to Cashfree Dashboard → Developers → API Keys
payments.cashfreeCreateKeys: Create a new set of keys
payments.cashfreeAppId: App ID → paste in "Client ID" field above
payments.cashfreeSecretKey: Secret Key → paste in "Client Secret" field above
payments.cashfreeWebhookEvents: Developers → Webhooks → Add → select these events:
payments.cashfreeWebhookNote: Cashfree uses your Secret Key for webhook verification - no separate webhook secret needed.
payments.payuKeyInstructions: Go to PayU Dashboard → One Dashboard → Manage Account → Merchant Key-Salt
payments.payuMerchantKey: Merchant Key → paste in "Merchant Key" field above
payments.payuMerchantId: Merchant ID → found on the dashboard header
payments.payuWebhookNote: PayU uses redirect callbacks, not webhook events. No event selection needed.
payments.payuSaltNote: PayU uses Merchant Salt for hash verification - no separate webhook secret needed.
